questions.text: When you're really into a game — are you someone who plays the same game for months on end (grinding out every achievement, completing everything), or do you bounce between different games pretty quickly? What's your all-time favorite game or franchise you've come back to more than once, and do you have a go-to genre that got you through the pandemic? Also, what's your setup — console, PC, or do you play on both?

For reading — are you particular about the format? Like, do you prefer physical books, Kindle/e-reader, or audiobooks? Do you mostly buy books, hit up the library, or borrow from friends? Any favorite authors or series you find yourself re-reading? And do you read differently depending on your mood — like, reach for something light and fun when you're tired versus something heavier when you want to think?

When you think about your life over the next few years — what are the concrete goals or milestones you're working toward? Do you keep them written down somewhere specific (a document, notes app, vision board), or do you just hold them in your head as a general direction? And when you hit something big — like landing a goal, making a big move, or a milestone — how do you mark or celebrate it, or do you just kind of move on to the next thing?

Do you have any interest in photography beyond just capturing memories on your phone? Like, do you ever think about composition, lighting, or framing when you're taking a photo? Do you have a proper camera (DSLR, mirrorless, film), or is that something you've wanted to explore more? And when you take photos — do you edit them at all, share them on social media, keep them to yourself, or do they just sit on your phone and never get looked at again?

When you're pouring yourself a drink at home or ordering at a bar — are you mostly a beer or wine person, or do you enjoy cocktails and spirits? Any specific drinks you always reach for (a particular whiskey, your go-to cocktail), or do you like exploring and trying new stuff? Have you ever gotten into making cocktails at home — like, do you have a small bar setup, bitters, anything you've experimented with — or is it more of a 'grab whatever's easy' vibe?
